summary: Full QA pass on 'The Program' strength training app. All 5 tabs load correctly, all 7 tool cards visible and navigable, sub-tool screens (calculator, converter, barguide, changelog) render without crashes. Review screen renders correctly. Program-reveal shows Phase 1 spinner but does not auto-advance to Phase 2 plan reveal within test window (may need more time or be expected when profile exists). No JS errors or red screens found.
action_items: Investigate program-reveal screen: if a plan exists in DB, the screen should advance past the Phase 1 spinner to Phase 2 plan reveal. Currently stays in loading state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Home tab shows 'No profile found' which is expected (no user profile in DB). Today tab shows DE Upper Week 1 Day 5 (correct for the plan). Log tab shows full ME Upper exercise list with RPE selectors working. Track shows PRs and Strength Trends. All 7 tools accessible. Program-reveal may need longer wait time to see Phase 2.
